# Scenario: server sends every event twice (flat bus + sync-wrapped)
#
# The server's sync system re-publishes sync events as regular bus events
# for backwards compatibility. Clients on the SSE stream receive BOTH
# forms for every event:
#   1. {payload: {type: "message.updated",   properties: {...}}}
#   2. {payload: {type: "sync", syncEvent: {type: "message.updated.1",
#                                           data: {...}}}}
#
# After unwrapping sync envelopes, both events dispatch to the same hook,
# causing doubled handler runs — which presents as:
#   - Two footer lines per assistant message (same numbers)
#   - Duplicate tool renders
#
# Expected: handler-visible effect exactly once per logical event.

:session ses_sync_dup
:directory /tmp/test-sync-dup

:api GET /session/ses_sync_dup/message 200 [{"info":{"id":"msg_user1","sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","role":"user","time":{"created":500000}},"parts":[{"id":"prt_u1","sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","messageID":"msg_user1","type":"text","text":"hi","time":{"start":500000,"end":500001}}]},{"info":{"id":"msg_asst1","sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","role":"assistant","time":{"created":1000000,"completed":1000050},"modelID":"test-model","agent":"test-agent","finish":"stop","tokens":{"input":10,"output":5,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}},"parts":[{"id":"prt_text1","sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"text","text":"hello","time":{"start":1000001,"end":1000002}}]}]

:api GET /session/ses_sync_dup 200 {"id":"ses_sync_dup","slug":"test","projectID":"proj1","directory":"/tmp/test-sync-dup","title":"Dedup Test","version":"1.0.0","time":{"created":500000,"updated":1000050}}

:api GET /session/ses_sync_dup/todo 200 []
:api GET /session/ses_sync_dup/diff 200 []

# ── Session becomes busy (flat + sync) ──
:sse {"type":"session.status","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","status":{"type":"busy"}}}
:sse {"payload":{"type":"sync","syncEvent":{"type":"session.status.1","id":"evt_1","seq":0,"aggregateID":"ses_sync_dup","data":{"sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","status":{"type":"busy"}}}}}
:assert-busy

# ── Assistant message created (flat + sync) ──
:sse {"type":"message.updated","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","info":{"id":"msg_asst1","sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","role":"assistant","time":{"created":1000000},"modelID":"test-model","agent":"test-agent","tokens":{"input":0,"output":0,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}}}}
:sse {"payload":{"type":"sync","syncEvent":{"type":"message.updated.1","id":"evt_2","seq":1,"aggregateID":"ses_sync_dup","data":{"sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","info":{"id":"msg_asst1","sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","role":"assistant","time":{"created":1000000},"modelID":"test-model","agent":"test-agent","tokens":{"input":0,"output":0,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}}}}}}

# ── Step-start (flat + sync) ──
:sse {"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","part":{"id":"prt_step1","sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"step-start","snapshot":"abc"}}}
:sse {"payload":{"type":"sync","syncEvent":{"type":"message.part.updated.1","id":"evt_3","seq":2,"aggregateID":"ses_sync_dup","data":{"sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","part":{"id":"prt_step1","sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"step-start","snapshot":"abc"}}}}}

# ── Text part init (flat + sync) ──
:sse {"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","part":{"id":"prt_text1","sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"text","text":"","time":{"start":1000001}}}}
:sse {"payload":{"type":"sync","syncEvent":{"type":"message.part.updated.1","id":"evt_4","seq":3,"aggregateID":"ses_sync_dup","data":{"sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","part":{"id":"prt_text1","sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"text","text":"","time":{"start":1000001}}}}}}

# ── Text delta (flat + sync) ──
:sse {"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","part":{"id":"prt_text1","sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"text","text":"hello","time":{"start":1000001}},"delta":"hello"}}
:sse {"payload":{"type":"sync","syncEvent":{"type":"message.part.updated.1","id":"evt_5","seq":4,"aggregateID":"ses_sync_dup","data":{"sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","part":{"id":"prt_text1","sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"text","text":"hello","time":{"start":1000001}},"delta":"hello"}}}}
:assert-contains hello

# ── Step-finish with tokens (flat + sync) ──
:sse {"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","part":{"id":"prt_stepfin1","sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"step-finish","reason":"stop","tokens":{"total":15,"input":10,"output":5,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}}}}
:sse {"payload":{"type":"sync","syncEvent":{"type":"message.part.updated.1","id":"evt_6","seq":5,"aggregateID":"ses_sync_dup","data":{"sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","part":{"id":"prt_stepfin1","sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"step-finish","reason":"stop","tokens":{"total":15,"input":10,"output":5,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}}}}}}

# ── Text finalized (flat + sync) ──
:sse {"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","part":{"id":"prt_text1","sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"text","text":"hello","time":{"start":1000001,"end":1000002}}}}
:sse {"payload":{"type":"sync","syncEvent":{"type":"message.part.updated.1","id":"evt_7","seq":6,"aggregateID":"ses_sync_dup","data":{"sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","part":{"id":"prt_text1","sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","messageID":"msg_asst1","type":"text","text":"hello","time":{"start":1000001,"end":1000002}}}}}}

# ── Message completed (flat + sync) — triggers footer render ──
:sse {"type":"message.updated","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","info":{"id":"msg_asst1","sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","role":"assistant","time":{"created":1000000,"completed":1000050},"modelID":"test-model","agent":"test-agent","finish":"stop","tokens":{"input":10,"output":5,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}}}}
:sse {"payload":{"type":"sync","syncEvent":{"type":"message.updated.1","id":"evt_8","seq":7,"aggregateID":"ses_sync_dup","data":{"sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","info":{"id":"msg_asst1","sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","role":"assistant","time":{"created":1000000,"completed":1000050},"modelID":"test-model","agent":"test-agent","finish":"stop","tokens":{"input":10,"output":5,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}}}}}}

# ── Idle (flat + sync) ──
:sse {"type":"session.status","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_sync_dup","status":{"type":"idle"}}}
:sse {"type":"session.idle","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_sync_dup"}}
:assert-idle
:assert-contains hello

# ── Key assertion: the message footer appears exactly once. ──
# The input area also shows a `Tokens: ...` line with `⬆`, so we can't
# just count arrows — we narrow by duration suffix (" · Ns") that only
# the per-message footer has.
:eval (let ((count 0)) (save-excursion (goto-char (point-min)) (while (re-search-forward "⬆[0-9]+ ⬇[0-9]+.*· [0-9]+s" nil t) (setq count (1+ count)))) (should (= count 1)))
